error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
rate_limit_exceeded: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
home_board_empty_title: No time off in the next two weeks
home_board_empty_description: Absences from you, your teams, and calendars shared with you show up here.
home_board_connect_description: Join a team or get a calendar shared with you to see when others are away.
home_board_footnote: Only people with time off are shown.
home_next_time_off_empty_description: Time off you add in the calendar shows up here.
calendar_empty_description: There are no events this month.
calendar_event_add_description: Fill in the details for the new event.
validation_email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation_password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation_password_max: Password must be at most 128 characters.
validation_event_title_required: A title is required for "Other" events
validation_event_end_before_start: The end must be after the start
auth_error_email_taken: An account with this email already exists.
auth_error_email_not_verified: Please verify your email before signing in.
auth_error_invalid_token: This link is invalid or has expired.
auth_login_description: Enter your credentials to access your account.
auth_signup_description: Fill in the details below to get started.
auth_signup_success: Account created. Check your email to verify it.
auth_verify_description: We sent a verification link to {email}.
auth_forgot_description: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth_forgot_sent: If an account exists for that email, a reset link is on its way.
auth_reset_success: Password updated. You can sign in now.
auth_reset_invalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
email_verify_body: Click the link below to verify your email address.
email_reset_body: Click the link below to choose a new password. If you didn't request this, you can ignore this email.
email_change_body: You requested to change your email to {newEmail}. Click the link below to confirm.
settings_email_description: We'll send a confirmation link to your current address.
settings_email_sent: Check your current inbox to confirm the change.
settings_password_description: Other sessions will be signed out.
settings_delete_description: Permanently delete your account and all data.
settings_delete_confirm_description: This action cannot be undone. Enter your password to confirm.
error_forbidden: You do not have permission to do that.
teams_empty: You are not a member of any team yet.
teams_create_description: Team members automatically see one another's calendars.
team_transfer_confirm_description: {name} will become the owner and you will become an admin.
team_delete_confirm_description: This removes the team, its memberships, its invitations, and its calendar shares.
team_leave_confirm_description: You will stop seeing your teammates' calendars.
team_share_description: Share the calendars of all team members with a person or another team.
share_form_description: The recipient will be able to see your events.
share_duplicate: This calendar is already shared with that recipient.
share_self: You cannot share a calendar with yourself.
share_back_gone: This share is no longer available.
invitation_gone: This invitation is no longer valid.
email_team_invite_body: Accept the invitation to see your teammates' calendars in Out of Office.
email_calendar_shared_body: You can now see their events in Out of Office. From your notifications you can share your calendar back.
email_event_change_body: {name} changed "{title}" on a calendar you can see.
landing_meta_title: The shared time-off calendar for small teams
landing_meta_description: A shared time-off calendar for small teams. Add your days away, share your calendar, and nobody has to ask who's off.
landing_hero_chip: Automatic reply: I'm out of office
landing_hero_title_rest: And everyone knows when you're back.
landing_hero_subtitle: Out of Office is a shared time-off calendar for small teams. Add your days away, share your calendar with people or whole teams, and nobody has to ask around.
landing_hero_screenshot_alt: Month view of a team calendar with color-coded time-off events
landing_features_title: Everything a team needs to be away
landing_features_subtitle: Six kinds of time off, one shared picture of who's where.
landing_feature_board_title: The next two weeks, at a glance
landing_feature_board_description: The home board lines up everyone's absences for the coming fortnight — who's away right now, and when they're back.
landing_feature_board_alt: Availability board showing teammates' absences over two weeks
landing_feature_calendar_title: A real calendar, not a spreadsheet
landing_feature_calendar_description: Month, week, and agenda views. Drag an event to move it. Vacation, sick leave, business trips, remote days — each in its own color.
landing_feature_sharing_title: Share with a person or a whole team
landing_feature_sharing_description: Share your calendar with a teammate by email, or create a team and everyone sees each other automatically. Unshare any time.
landing_feature_sharing_alt: Sharing screen with teams and individual calendar shares
landing_feature_notifications_descriptio: When someone adds or moves time off, the people who share a calendar with them hear about it — in the app and by email.
landing_how_title: Out of office in three steps
landing_how_step1_description: Create an account and put your vacation, trips, and remote days on the calendar.
landing_how_step2_description: Invite teammates to a team, or share with individual people by email.
landing_how_step3_description: Your team sees who's away and when you're back — nobody has to ask.
landing_faq_free_answer: Yes. Create an account, invite your team, and use the whole product for free.
landing_faq_edit_answer: No. Shared calendars are view-only — only you can add, move, or delete your own events.
landing_faq_sharing_answer: You can share your calendar with individual people by email, or create a team where everyone sees each other. Recipients can share back from a notification, and you can hide or revoke a share at any time.
landing_cta_title: Set your out-of-office once, for everyone.
landing_cta_subtitle: It takes a minute to add your first time off.
landing_footer_tagline: The shared time-off calendar for small teams.
